title: Ninja’s microwave air fryer could be the fix for soggy reheated pizza
summary: Ninja has launched its first microwave, which doubles as an air fryer to crisp reheated food. The Crispi Microwave allows users to switch from microwave heating to air frying after cooking, potentially replacing two appliances with one. It's available now for $449.
content:
Ninja has added everything from ice cream makers to double-decker toaster ovens to its extensive lineup of counter-clogging appliances, but it's only now introducing its first microwave. What makes the new Ninja Crispi Microwave stand out among its many competitors is that it doubles as an air fryer. After heating your food using microwaves, you have the option to switch over to using superheated air so the results are crispy instead of soggy, while also potentially replacing two kitchen appliances with just one multitasker. It's available starting today through SharkNinja's online store for $449.
It comes with a bunch of standard microwave …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Ninja的微波炉空气炸锅可能是解决披萨重新加热后变软的办法
zh.summary: Ninja推出了其首款微波炉，它兼具空气炸锅功能，可以为重新加热的食物增加酥脆口感。Crispi微波炉允许用户在烹饪后从微波加热切换到空气炸锅模式，有可能用一台设备替代两台设备。现在可以以449美元的价格购买。

title: Samsung’s Galaxy Z Flip 8 leaks a week before launch event
summary: Leaked images reveal Samsung's Galaxy Z Flip 8 will be largely identical to the Z Flip 7, with minimal upgrades. The main improvements are the Exynos 2600 processor and support for 45W wired charging. Samsung is expected to officially announce the device soon.
content:
Samsung's next flip phone might be tough to tell apart from last year's Galaxy Z Flip 7. As 9to5Google points out, leaked images and specs for the upcoming Galaxy Z Flip 8 shared by WinFuture are nearly identical to Samsung's current flip phone.
According to the leak, Samsung is not planning to upgrade the Z Flip 8 to one of Qualcomm's Snapdragon processors. Instead, it will have a Samsung Exynos 2600 chip, the successor to the previous-generation Exynos 2500 in the Z Flip 7. The only other notable upgrade is support for 45W wired charging. 
Samsung is expected to officially announce the Z Flip 8, and the rest of its new lineup of foldable …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星Galaxy Z Flip 8在发布会前一周泄露
zh.summary: 泄露的图像显示三星Galaxy Z Flip 8与Z Flip 7基本相同，仅进行了最小升级。主要改进包括Exynos 2600处理器和45W有线充电支持。三星预计将很快正式发布该设备。

title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
summary: Apple has received approval to launch Apple Intelligence in China through partnerships with Alibaba and Baidu, marking a significant milestone for the company's AI expansion in a key market. The deal fulfills rumors from last year about Apple's AI infrastructure in China.
content: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

zh.title: Apple Intelligence获批在中国与阿里巴巴和百度合作推出
zh.summary: Apple已获批通过与阿里巴巴和百度的合作在中国推出Apple Intelligence，这是该公司在关键市场人工智能扩展的重要里程碑。该交易实现了去年关于Apple在中国AI基础设施的传言。

title: OnePlus never had a chance in the US
summary: OnePlus has announced its exit from the United States after an eight-year presence, ending a period of declining market share. The company lost carrier support from T-Mobile and Verizon, reducing its ability to compete despite releasing well-reviewed flagship phones. Oppo will continue providing software updates and warranty support for existing US devices.
content:
After an eight-year run, OnePlus announced today that it has exited the United States. It's bittersweet, as the brand has been on a comeback tour of sorts with its excellent OnePlus 15 and widely praised (though still too expensive) OnePlus Open.
The writing has been on the wall for a while now. T-Mobile stopped stocking OnePlus' flagship phones after 2022, instead deciding to only carry its low-end Nord devices, and Verizon's run with OnePlus only lasted two years, from 2020 through 2021. Even though it continued releasing flagships, OnePlus' US footprint has been fading. In January, Android Headlines even claimed that the brand was being  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 一加在美国从未有机会
zh.summary: 一加在美国运营八年后宣布退出，结束了市场份额不断下滑的时期。该公司失去了T-Mobile和Verizon的运营商支持，尽管发布了评价很高的旗舰手机，但这减少了其竞争力。Oppo将继续为现有美国用户的设备提供软件更新和保修支持。

title: Claude can now use your 1Password credentials for you
summary: 1Password has launched a browser integration allowing Claude AI to access stored credentials and complete multi-step tasks like booking travel without exposing the data to Anthropic. The integration uses a zero-exposure security framework that injects credentials only when needed for specific authorized tasks.
content:
1Password has launched a new browser integration for Claude that allows the Anthropic chatbot to access stored security credentials like usernames and passwords. The 1Password for Claude feature means that users can authorize Claude to complete multi-step tasks like booking travel and managing online accounts on their behalf without having to manually input their login credentials, but without actually exposing your security information to Anthropic's AI models, according to 1Password.
That's made possible by a new "zero-exposure security framework" developed by 1Password, which works by injecting the required credentials for each task thro …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Claude现在可以使用你的1Password凭证
zh.summary: 1Password推出了浏览器集成，允许Claude AI访问存储的凭证并完成多步骤任务，如预订旅行，无需向Anthropic暴露数据。该集成采用零暴露安全框架，仅在特定授权任务需要时注入凭证。

title: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe
summary: The European Union has ordered Google to grant rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to Android and Google Search platforms to comply with digital antitrust rules. Google must share search data by January 2027 and implement Android changes by July 2027, potentially weakening its control over critical platforms. The rulings could reshape the future of Gemini and create new opportunities for competitors.
content:
Google must give rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to key parts of Android and Google Search after the European Union ordered the company to comply with the bloc's digital antitrust rules. 
The two decisions, handed down Thursday, could weaken Google's control over two of the tech industry's most important platforms and have far-reaching consequences for the company, shape the future of its AI tool Gemini, and open up new opportunities for rivals to gain ground. Google has until January 2027 to begin sharing search data and July 2027 to implement changes to Android.
The rulings stem from technical regulatory proceedings …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌被下令在欧洲向竞争对手开放Android和搜索
zh.summary: 欧盟已下令谷歌向竞争性AI助手和搜索引擎授予更大的访问权限，以遵守数字反垄断规则。谷歌必须在2027年1月前共享搜索数据，在2027年7月前实施Android变更，可能削弱其对关键平台的控制。这些裁决可能重塑Gemini的未来，为竞争对手创造新机遇。

title: Ultrahuman’s former hardware VP raises $5.5M for devices that control AI agents, not just record you
summary: A former Ultrahuman hardware executive has raised $5.5 million for Aina, a new device company focused on controlling AI agents rather than just recording user data. The startup plans to pilot its device in the coming weeks.
content: Aina is going to pilot a new device in the coming weeks.

zh.title: Ultrahuman前硬件副总裁为控制AI代理的设备融资550万美元
zh.summary: 前Ultrahuman硬件主管为Aina公司融资550万美元，这是一家专注于控制AI代理而非仅仅记录用户数据的新设备公司。该初创公司计划在未来几周内试点其设备。

title: Move over, GPS: Navigation satellites in low-Earth orbit are making a comeback
summary: Xona is developing a GPS alternative by deploying 258 satellites into low-Earth orbit as global positioning systems enter a new era. The move represents a shift back to navigation satellite constellations for improved positioning capabilities.
content: Xona aims to deploy 258 satellites into low-Earth orbit as a GPS alternative.

zh.title: 靠边站，GPS：低地球轨道导航卫星正在回归
zh.summary: Xona正在通过向低地球轨道部署258颗卫星来开发GPS替代品，全球定位系统进入新时代。这一举措代表着向导航卫星星座的转变，以提高定位能力。

title: Meta now alerts parents if their teen discussed suicide or self-harm with its AI chatbot
summary: Meta has introduced alerts for parents when teenagers discuss suicide or self-harm with its AI chatbot, as tech companies face regulatory scrutiny over AI chatbot crisis response. The updates reflect growing concerns about how AI systems handle vulnerable users, particularly minors in distress.
content: The updates come as Meta and other tech companies are facing scrutiny from regulators and parents around how AI chatbots respond to users in crisis, particularly teenagers.

zh.title: Meta现在会在青少年与其AI聊天机器人讨论自杀或自伤时向父母发出警告
zh.summary: Meta推出了当青少年与其AI聊天机器人讨论自杀或自伤时向父母发出警告的功能，因为科技公司面临关于AI聊天机器人危机应对的监管审查。这些更新反映了人们对AI系统如何处理脆弱用户（尤其是处于困境中的未成年人）的日益增长的关注。

title: Computer cops
summary: AI is increasingly being integrated into policing through automated tools presented at the International Association of Chiefs of Police Technology Conference, with vendors marketing solutions that automate routine investigative tasks. Critics warn that automating critical steps in the legal process could threaten civil liberties and the foundation of American policing.
content:
I stood before a hulking glass and brick structure in the heart of Fort Worth, Texas. Thousands gathered inside to see what had been billed as "the future of policing in the digital age." As press, I was prohibited from entering, but from a number of nearby locations, I met with attendees who told me what was being sold within. And I learned that AI is threatening to seize the very heart of policing in America.
The promise of AI at this year's International Association of Chiefs of Police (IACP) Technology Conference focused on automating routine parts of the job, which also happen to be critical steps in the legal process. It's a similar …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 电脑警察
zh.summary: 在国际警察局长协会技术大会上展示的自动化工具使人工智能越来越多地被整合到警务工作中，供应商正在推销能够自动化日常调查任务的解决方案。批评人士警告，将法律程序中的关键步骤自动化可能会威胁公民自由和美国警务的基础。

title: Phone maker OnePlus says it won’t release new phones in the US and Europe
summary: OnePlus has announced it will no longer launch new products in the US and European markets, marking a major retreat from these regions. The company could also wind down operations in India by 2027, further consolidating its global presence.
content: OnePlus could also wind down its operations in India by 2027.

zh.title: 手机制造商OnePlus表示不会在美国和欧洲发布新手机
zh.summary: OnePlus宣布将不再在美国和欧洲市场推出新产品，标志着从这些地区的重大撤退。该公司还可能在2027年前关闭印度业务，进一步巩固其全球业务。

title: OnePlus officially gives up on the US and Europe
summary: OnePlus has confirmed its exit from the US and European markets, with the OnePlus 15 being its final US flagship phone. Parent company Oppo will honor existing warranty and support agreements, transitioning devices to ColorOS for future updates.
content:
The OnePlus 15 was the company’s final US flagship. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

OnePlus has confirmed what industry observers have long expected: it's quitting the US and European markets, and will no longer launch new products in either region. Parent company Oppo promises that it will honor existing support and warranty agreements, with devices transitioning to its ColorOS for future updates.
"Software updates and after-sale support will be guaranteed" in both the US and Europe, Oppo's senior PR manager in Europe, James Paterson, told The Verge in a call. The company wouldn't confirm any specifics on how it will honor its warranty and support agreements in the US, where it will now have no presence at all. In Europe, …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OnePlus正式放弃美国和欧洲市场
zh.summary: OnePlus确认退出美国和欧洲市场，OnePlus 15是其最后一款美国旗舰手机。母公司Oppo将继续履行现有保修和支持协议，并将设备过渡到ColorOS进行未来更新。

title: Lululemon backs nylon-recycling startup Syntetica in $30M Series A
summary: Syntetica, a French nylon recycling startup, has secured $30M in Series A funding backed by Lululemon and other notable investors. The company has developed novel approaches to nylon recycling, which is significant given the environmental impact of synthetic materials in the fashion industry. This demonstrates growing investment in sustainable manufacturing technologies.
content: Syntetica, a French startup that has developed a novel approach to recycling nylon, has already obtained big-name partners and investors.

zh.title: Lululemon支持尼龙回收初创公司Syntetica完成3000万美元A轮融资
zh.summary: 法国尼龙回收初创公司Syntetica完成3000万美元A轮融资，由Lululemon和其他知名投资者支持。该公司开发了创新的尼龙回收方法，鉴于合成材料对时尚业的环保影响，这很重要。这表明投资者对可持续制造技术的关注持续增长。

title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
summary: Applied Computing has secured $20M in Series A funding to develop a foundation AI model tailored for the oil, gas, and petrochemical industries. This AI system aims to optimize operations across entire plants, potentially improving efficiency and decision-making in energy production. The investment highlights growing adoption of AI in traditionally capital-intensive industrial sectors.
content: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.

zh.title: Applied Computing推出面向油气运营商的全厂AI模型
zh.summary: Applied Computing获得2000万美元A轮融资，用于开发专为石油、天然气和石化产业定制的基础AI模型。该AI系统旨在优化整个工厂的运营，有助于提高能源生产的效率和决策质量。这笔投资彰显了AI在传统资本密集型工业部门的应用日益增加。

title: Why Greylock capped its new fund at $1.5B when it says it could have raised more
summary: Venture firm Greylock intentionally capped its new fund at $1.5B despite capacity to raise more, maintaining about 25 investments per fund to position itself as a crucial strategic partner to founders.
content: By keeping the number of investments to about 25 per fund, Greylock aims to remain what it calls "the most important partner" to its founders.

zh.title: 为什么Greylock将新基金限制在15亿美元，尽管表示可以筹集更多资金
zh.summary: 风险投资公司Greylock尽管有能力筹集更多资金，但仍故意将新基金限制在15亿美元，每只基金保持约25项投资，以将自己定位为创始人的关键战略合作伙伴。

title: Skullcandy’s bass-boosting Crusher headphones now come with Bose’s ANC
summary: Skullcandy released an updated Crusher wireless headphones version featuring Bose's QuietControl active noise cancellation and spatial audio for $279.99, addressing audio quality issues from excessive bass boosting.
content:
Skullcandy announced a new version of its Crusher wireless headphones today featuring a few of Bose's audio technologies including its QuietControl ANC and head-tracking spatial audio. The Crusher headphone line differentiates itself from the competition through the use of both full-range and dedicated bass drivers in each ear cup to boost deeper frequencies. Skullcandy admits that approach can result in a loss of audio quality when the bass is heavily boosted, but its new Crusher 1080 ANC are meant to address and improve that with Bose's help.
Available starting today for $279.99 in black, candy, primer, and cement color options, the new C …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Skullcandy的低音增强型Crusher耳机现在配备了Bose的主动降噪功能
zh.summary: Skullcandy推出了更新版本的Crusher无线耳机，搭载Bose的QuietControl主动降噪和空间音频，售价279.99美元，解决了过度低音增强造成的音质问题。
